scripts.db:migrate: for f in migrations/0001_initial.sql migrations/0002_seed_invites.sql migrations/0003_add_source.sql migrations/0004_drop_old_index.sql migrations/0005_add_sharing.sql migrations/0006_add_fav_tools.sql migrations/0007_add_git_metadata.sql migrations/0008_add_git_machine.sql migrations/0009_add_platform.sql migrations/0010_add_token_expiry.sql; do echo "Running $f..."; npx wrangler d1 execute claude-leaderboard-db --file=$f; done
scripts.db:migrate:local: for f in migrations/0001_initial.sql migrations/0002_seed_invites.sql migrations/0003_add_source.sql migrations/0004_drop_old_index.sql migrations/0005_add_sharing.sql migrations/0006_add_fav_tools.sql migrations/0007_add_git_metadata.sql migrations/0008_add_git_machine.sql migrations/0009_add_platform.sql migrations/0010_add_token_expiry.sql; do echo "Running $f..."; npx wrangler d1 execute claude-leaderboard-db --local --file=$f; done
